entry.title: Abstract CT182: Camu camu plus nivolumab/ipilimumab (N/I) as first-line therapy for metastatic renal cell carcinoma (mRCC): A randomized phase I trial

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: RB Carrillo, M Zugman, B Routy, M Geiger, X Li... - Cancer Research, 2026

Abstract: ... In this first randomized trial evaluating a natural prebiotic with ICI in first-line mRCC, the addition of camu camu prolonged PFS and beneficially shifted the gut microbiome. The irAEs observed with camu camu, together with associated cytokine ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Complexity

entry.title: Revisiting Natural Evil

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:

Journal: 2026

Abstract: This paper revisits our understanding of natural evil and its related defences in the light of relatively new evidence in Complex Systems Science and Science and Technology Studies. Complex Systems Science shows unpredictability is a ...

entry.title: THE UNBROKEN THREAD CONFIRMED: RYUGU, BENNU, AND THE PRESOLAR RECURSIVE ARCHITECTURE

Authors: DL Gaconnet

Journal: 2026

entry.title: Prebiotic aqueous reactions catalyzed by native nickel without hydrogen

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: CG Garcia, M Brabender, WF Martin - The FEBS journal

Abstract: Compared to iron, nickel is comparatively rare as a transition metal in enzymes. However, it is essential in several enzymes of carbon and energy metabolism in acetogens (bacteria) and methanogens (archaea), which use the acetyl-CoA ...

Abstract: Algal polysaccharides exhibit various biological activities, but reports on Spirogyra spp. are limited. This study characterized the physicochemical properties of PSN and PSNE polysaccharides extracted from Spirogyra spp. collected from Nan and ...

entry.title: An oral dual-targeting inulin-based nanomicelle for ulcerative colitis therapy via combined H2S-mediated immunomodulation with prebiotic microbiota regulation

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: C Xu, M Su, M Xu, C Shi, H Lu, L Yu, H Ni, Y Zhao... - Nano Today, 2026

Abstract: Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) is driven by a self-perpetuating cycle of epithelial barrier disruption, immune dysregulation, and gut microbiota dysbiosis. Breaking this vicious loop is critical for effective treatment. Here, we developed an orally ...
